mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_session_member ( session_id, user_id, role, session_key, join_time, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{sessionId}, #{userId}, #{role}, #{sessionKey}, #{joinTime}, NOW(), NOW() )

INSERT INTO chat_session_member ( session_id, user_id, role, session_key, join_time, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{member.sessionId}, #{member.userId}, #{member.role}, #{member.sessionKey}, #{member.joinTime}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chat_session_member WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND leave_time IS NULL ORDER BY role DESC, join_time ASC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM chat_session_member WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND user_id = #{userId}
